title: papaver dubium subsp. modestum
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. modestum, also known as the yellow poppy or small-flowered poppy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, derived from its alkaloids, including papaverine and thebaine. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety, promoting relaxation, and potentially alleviating pain. Papaver dubium subsp. modestum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
